app.name: DevExtreme CLI
app.one_liner: A command-line interface for scaffolding, theming, and managing DevExtreme-based applications with built-in authentication UI templates.

screens.name: CLI Command Interface
screens.purpose: Provide a terminal-based interface for executing DevExtreme project setup, theme building, and authentication template generation.

rust_commands.name: build_theme
rust_commands.purpose: Compile and customize DevExtreme themes using the ThemeBuilder workflow.

rust_commands.name: generate_auth_ui
rust_commands.purpose: Generate React-based authentication UI templates including login, sign-up, and password reset forms with client-side API integration.

rust_commands.name: init_project
rust_commands.purpose: Scaffold a new DevExtreme application with selected framework and features.

mvp_plan: week 1: Implement project initialization command supporting React and Angular
week 1: Integrate authentication UI template generator for React
week 1: Set up theme building pipeline compatible with Yarn
acceptance_tests: ThemeBuilder workflow executes successfully in CI and produces valid CSS output.
User can generate a complete authentication flow (login, signup, password reset) via CLI and integrate it with a mock backend.
User can run 'devextreme init' to scaffold a new React app with DevExtreme controls.
